description: Right fragment: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Very deferential. Asking for a favor from the addressee (sayyidnā). The sender says that he would be able to obtain all that he needs if he could travel to al-Maḥalla 'or elsewhere' — evidently his goal is to leave his current place/position.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
